_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: kinetic measurements showed the reduced activities of mitochondrial respiration when FT895 was administered to S462TY, T265, and ST8814 cell lines...Furthermore, S462TY and T265 displayed no reaction to the treatment
details: Reduced activities of mitochondrial respiration and no reaction to ATP synthase inhibitor, oxidative phosphorylation uncoupler, and complex I/III inhibitors after 24h FT895 treatment
